# Code of Conduct

## Our commitment

We are committed to making participation in TabNexus a respectful, welcoming, and harassment-free experience for everyone, regardless of background, identity, experience level, or personal characteristics.

## Expected behavior

- Be respectful, constructive, and specific.
- Assume good intent while discussing the impact of an idea or change honestly.
- Welcome questions and help people learn without condescension.
- Focus feedback on the work, not the person.
- Respect privacy. Do not post another person's browser data, credentials, or identifying information.

## Unacceptable behavior

- Harassment, threats, discriminatory language, or personal attacks.
- Sexualized language or unwanted attention.
- Trolling, deliberate disruption, or sustained bad-faith argument.
- Publishing private information without explicit permission.
- Any conduct that would reasonably be considered inappropriate in a professional community.

## Enforcement

Maintainers may edit or remove comments, issues, commits, code, or other contributions that violate this Code of Conduct, and may temporarily or permanently restrict participation when necessary.

To report conduct privately, contact the maintainers through the repository owner's GitHub profile. Reports will be reviewed as promptly and confidentially as practical.

## Scope

This Code of Conduct applies in project spaces and when someone is officially representing the project in public spaces.

This policy is inspired by the [Contributor Covenant](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/), version 2.1.
